name: bitcoin-arbitrage-sentinel
description: WebSocket-first Bitcoin arbitrage simulator with CCXT Pro streams, Redis Pub/Sub, triangular routing, risk controls, and a live dashboard.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/engine/arbitrageEngine.js && node --check src/engine/marketDataEngine.js && node --check src/engine/triangularArbitrageEngine.js && node --check src/engine/opportunityQueue.js && node --check src/exchanges/ccxtStreamProvider.js && node --check src/integrations/redisBus.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check tests/server.test.js && node --check tests/opportunityQueue.test.js && node --check tests/riskManager.test.js && node --check tests/triangular.test.js
